source_name: DCCEEW Australian Energy Statistics — generation by state

fields.scope_note: Australian Energy Statistics covers ALL Australian generation (NEM + SWIS + DKIS + off-grid + behind-the-meter rooftop solar). This is the authoritative whole-of-Australia by-state series. AEMO covers NEM and WEM but not behind-the-meter rooftop and not NT DKIS uniformly.
fields.primary_source_document: DCCEEW Australian Energy Update / Australian Energy Statistics — Table O (electricity generation by fuel and state).
fields.keying_plan: Key annual GWh per state from Table O. Include both grid-connected and off-grid where reported. Annual lag of ~12 months.

notes: Awaiting hand-keyed annual electricity generation GWh per state from DCCEEW Australian Energy Statistics Table O. This is the authoritative whole-of-Australia state breakdown — it includes NEM, SWIS, DKIS and rooftop solar.
citation: DCCEEW, Australian Energy Update and Australian Energy Statistics (energy.gov.au), Table O.
